productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Semi oxfords Green Casual Shoes
description: Make your trips to the club all more special with these suede brogues from carlton london. Look classy in the semi-formal shoes, when paired with slim Fit Canvas and a full sleeves shirt, on a casual Friday.UpperSuede upper with patent brogue perforationsCentral lacing with suede tongue with a metallic liningMidsoleMetallic footbed with a soft feelFull length EVA midsole for durabilityOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with protruding patterns for added gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
